# Smart Ingest - Iterable

## Iterable’s Smart Ingest

Co-Developed with Hightouch

**Activate More of Your Data, No Engineers Required**

Personalize your cross-channel customer communications by ingesting data directly from your data warehouse in a marketer friendly no code visual UI.

Request Demo

### Cross-Channel Journeys

Orchestrate email, push, SMS, in-app, and web messages from a single canvas with real-time branching logic.

![Iterable](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/iterable-logo-light.svg)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Smart-Ingest_Img1-1-1024x773.png)

## Personalize with data from your data warehouse

*   Ingest, test, and scale new data in your customer communications in a free* to use no-code interface.
*   Bring your data as-is, no need to build custom tables or re-architect your data.
*   Activate any data including user attributes, product details, custom events, and more!

* up to 5 free production syncs per organization per calendar month

## Reduce your dependence on tech teams

*   23+ sources supported, including Snowflake, Redshift, BigQuery, Databricks, and more.
*   Sync up to every 15 minutes, with real-time data processing to power in-the-moment decisioning and orchestration.
*   Monitor connection status and troubleshoot errors for syncs in an intuitive dashboard.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/smart-ingest-tech-1024x875.png)

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/Smart-Ingest_Img3-1-1024x910.png)

## Enterprise grade security

*   SOC Type 2 Certified. HIPAA, GDPR, and CCPA compliant. Meets global storage and processing requirements.
*   No data is stored in transit.
*   End-to-end encryption.

/
